title: CENTRAL OREGON COMMUNITY COLLEGE - 211info
text: CENTRAL OREGON COMMUNITY COLLEGE CENTRAL OREGON COMMUNITY COLLEGE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a variety of educational, vocational, college credit, and developmental courses, including adult basic education, GED test instruction, continuing education opportunities, and English as a Second Language classes. Campuses are located in Bend, Redmond, Madras, and Prineville. 2600 NW College Way Bend, OR 97703 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (541) 383-7700 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 383-7700 FAX (545) 318-3700 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information or to register FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: Varies by service LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Crook, Deschutes, Jefferson, Northern Klamath (97733), and Southern Wasco (97761) Counties. Services: Adult Basic Education Community Colleges English as a Second Language GED/High School Equivalency Test Instruction Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - DENTAL CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
